title: OPTION-GEN output — options per DP* (individual option file, not index)

id.description: DP id carried verbatim from 01-decision-points; never re-minted

decision.description: Decision text carried verbatim from 01; never re-authored

category.description: Category carried verbatim from 01; never re-categorized

forced_by.description: Forcing aPRD ids carried verbatim from 01

cut_ref.description: Cut element reference carried verbatim from 01

grounding.description: Provenance of option set: existing system, canon, or reasoned from first principles

existing_system.description: Existing system constraint text; n/a for greenfield

canon_status.description: absent | canon version when arch-canon.json present

source.description: existing_system | canon | reasoned; source actually used

note.description: One line: where option set came from; if reasoned, canon absent + first principles used

options.description: ≥2 real, distinct, compliant, unranked alternatives; order NOT preference order

option.description: Concrete candidate name (e.g. 'Modular monolith with enforced module boundaries')

summary.description: One line: what this approach is

reason_to_consider.description: One line: why competent team genuinely weighs it here — anti-strawman proof

tradeoffs.description: Neutral bidirectional tradeoffs; every option carries both; never verdict, weight, ranking, or recommendation

strengths.description: Neutral strengths relative to this decision's forces

bears_on.description: aPRD/cut ids whose forces these tradeoffs touch; eval hooks for EVALUATE-DECIDE; not score

degenerate.description: True only when exactly one compliant real option survives honestly; then degenerate_reason set

degenerate_reason.description: Why fork collapsed to one when degenerate; null otherwise

no_pick_note.description: Fixed reminder: OPTION-GEN does not recommend; EVALUATE-DECIDE picks
